arts.ttl: 'Deserved it slightly more' - Luis Enrique makes Liverpool claim after PSG penalty shootout win
arts.sum: The PSG boss spoke to the media after his side knocked Liverpool out of the Champions League at Anfield on Tuesday night

arts.ttl: ‘Wow’ – Thierry Henry Left Stunned by PSG’s Second-Leg Masterclass vs Liverpool
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain advanced to the UEFA Champions League quarterfinals after defeating Liverpool 4-1 in a penalty shootout (1-1 on aggregate) on Tuesday night at Anfield. The opening goal came in the 39th minute when Nuno Mendes found Ousmane Dembele in the middle, who quickly laid it off to Bradley Barcola on the right. arts.ttl: Supercomputer predicts when Liverpool will win Premier League title in blow for Arsenal
arts.sum: Liverpool are closing in on winning the Premier League title, with Arsenal's form plummeting and Arne Slot's side boasting a 15-point lead with just nine matches remaining

arts.ttl: Slot: Loss to PSG 'best game' I've been part of
arts.sum: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot described the second leg of his team's Champions League tie with Paris Saint-Germain as the "best game of football" he has been involved in.

arts.ttl: Does Liverpool's Champions League exit to PSG reveal a flaw in the revamped competition?
arts.sum: But it is something now to take into consideration how much worth it is to end up first in the league table if you can face Paris Saint-Germain in the next round,” Slot said. Liverpool’s reward for dominating the competition’s new-look league format was to run into a roadblock in the shape of Paris Saint-Germain in the round of 16.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot shares Liverpool injury update as key defender set to miss Carabao Cup final

arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Liverpool, Arsenal, Man Utd eye Raphinha
arts.sum: Raphinha's fine form for Barcelona has Liverpool, Arsenal and Manchester United all interested. Transfer Talk has the latest news, gossip and rumors.
